vakriman m. [vakra-imanic]
1 Crookedness, curvature.
2 Equivocation, evasion, ambiguity; tortuous, round.
(pb) about or indirect nature (as of a speech); tadvaktrāṃbujasaurabhaṃ sa ca sudhāsyaṃdī girāṃ vakrimā  Gīt. 3. 
3 Cunningness, duplicity, craftiness.
